svg.title: Case 6, team of Ronaldos versus team of U19s
svg.desc: Two full 4-3-3 formations facing each other across the halfway line. The left side is all eleven red Ronaldo dots; the right side is all eleven blue U19 dots.
svg.text: Case 6 — team of Ronaldos vs team of U19s
Same framework, better model. Ronaldos win.
